Metadata.SourceFile: Masters of the Universe - The Ilearth Stone.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x45C2 "MASTERSOFTHEUNIVERSETHEILEARTHSTONE-45C2" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Masters of the Universe - The Ilearth Stone.prg"
